---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code. 

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Ctrl+Shift+Enter*. 
```{r}
groupby_imov$municipio_sem_acento <- clean_municipality_names(groupby_imov$municip)
```

```{r}
municp_agg_codimov <- groupby_imov %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  group_by(municipio_sem_acento) %>%
  summarise(count_app = n(),
            mean_app = mean(total_app),
            sum_app = sum(total_app),
            max_app = max(total_app),
            median_app = median(total_app)
            )
```
```{r}
## Merge back in shapefile from IBGE
sf_merged <- municipio_sf %>%
  left_join(municp_agg_codimov, by = c("municipio_sem_acento" = "municipio_sem_acento")) 
```
```{r}
st_write(sf_merged,
         '../../APP/filtragem_tentativa/Municipio_com_app_car.shp')
```


```{r}

# plot
ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data=municipio_sf, fill="#2D3E50",
          color="#FEBF57",
          size=.15,
          show.legend = FALSE) +
  labs(subtitle="Municipios de SC", size=8) +
  theme_minimal() 
#  no_axis

```

```{r}
## Agrupa os ja agrupados dados por id_imovel em municipio. 
## Calcula numero de APP, media das APP, 
municp_agg_codimov <- groupby_codimovel %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  group_by(municipio_sem_acento) %>%
  summarise(count_app = n(),
            mean_app = mean(ttl_r_p),
            sum_app = sum(ttl_r_p),
            max_app = max(ttl_r_p),
            median_app = median(ttl_r_p)
            )
```

```{r}
# Make the merge
sf_merged <- municipio_sf %>%
  left_join(municp_agg_codimov, by = c("municipio_sem_acento" = "municipio_sem_acento")) 
```

```{r}
hist(sf_merged$sum_app)
```

```{r}
ggplot(sf_merged) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = sum_app)) +
  theme_void()
```
```{r}
ggplot(sf_merged) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = sum_app)) +
theme_void() +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(
    trans = "log", breaks = c(1, 10, 50, 100, 500, 1000,2000,5000),
    name = "Soma das Areas de APP",
    guide = guide_legend(
      keyheight = unit(3, units = "mm"),
      keywidth = unit(12, units = "mm"),
      direction = 'vertical',
      label.position = "right",
      title.position = "top",
      nrow = 1
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Demanda de Restauracao Ambiental por Municipio",
    subtitle = "Soma das Areas de Passivo",
    caption = "Data: CAR"
  ) +
  theme(
    text = element_text(color = "#22211d"),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "#f5f5f2", color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#f5f5f2", color = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#f5f5f2", color = NA),
    plot.title = element_text(
      size = 16, hjust = 0.01, color = "#4e4d47",
      margin = margin(
        b = -0.1, t = 0.4, l = 2,
        unit = "cm"
      )
    ),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(
      size = 12, hjust = 0.01,
      color = "#4e4d47",
      margin = margin(
        b = -0.1, t = 0.43, l = 2,
        unit = "cm"
      )
    ),
    plot.caption = element_text(
      size = 8,
      color = "#4e4d47",
      margin = margin(
        b = 0.3, r = -99, t = 0.3,
        unit = "cm"
      )
    ),
    legend.position = c(0.7, 0.00)
  )

```
```{r}
ggplot(sf_merged) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = count_app)) +
  theme_void()
```
```{r}
ggplot(sf_merged) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = max_app)) +
  theme_void()
```

```{r}
ggplot(sf_merged) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = sum_app)) +
  theme_void() +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(
    trans = "log", breaks = c(1, 10, 50, 100, 500, 1000, 2000, 5000),
    name = "Soma das Areas de APP",
    guide = guide_colorbar(
      direction = "vertical",
      barwidth = unit(10, "mm"),
      barheight = unit(80, "mm"),
      title.position = "top",
      label.position = "right"
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Demanda de Restauracao Ambiental por Municipio",
    subtitle = "Soma das Areas de Passivo",
    caption = "Data: CAR"
  ) +
  theme(
    text = element_text(color = "#22211d"),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "#f5f5f2", color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#f5f5f2", color = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#f5f5f2", color = NA),
    plot.title = element_text(
      size = 20,
      hjust = 0.01,
      color = "#4e4d47",
      margin = margin(
        b = -0.1,
        t = 0.4,
        l = 2,
        unit = "cm"
      )
    ),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(
      size = 15,
      hjust = 0.01,
      color = "#4e4d47",
      margin = margin(
        b = -0.1, t = 0.43, l = 2,
        unit = "cm"
      )
    ),
    plot.caption = element_text(
      size = 10,
      color = "#4e4d47",
      margin = margin(
        b = 0.3, r = -99, t = 0.3,
        unit = "cm"
      )
    ),
   # legend.position = c(0.9, 0.5)  # Moved to right side of plot
  )
```
```{r}
big_plot <- ggplot(groupby_codimovel) +
  geom_sf( data = municipio_sf,
           fill='grey',
           alpha=0.3) +
  geom_point(
    aes(x = geometry.x, y = geometry.y,
        size = ttl_r_p, color = ttl_r_p), alpha = 0.9
  )
```

```{r}
# Create a grid 
grid <- st_make_grid(groupby_codimovel, cellsize = c(0.25, 0.25), square = FALSE) %>% 
  st_sf(grid_id = 1:length(.))

print(length(unique(grid$grid_id)))
```

```{r}

#
# Join points to grid cells and aggregate
aggregated_points <- groupby_codimovel %>%
  st_join(grid) %>%
  group_by(grid_id) %>%
  summarize(
    point_count = n(),
    total_area = sum(ttl_r_p, na.rm = TRUE),
    # Add other aggregations as needed
#    #geometry = first(geometry.y)  # Take grid cell geometry
  )
```

```{r}
# Convert to centroids for bubble plotting
#aggregated_centroids <- st_centroid(aggregated_points)

# Plot
ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = grid) +
  geom_sf(data = aggregated_points,
          aes(col = total_area),
          alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_size_continuous(name = "Total Area") +
  theme_minimal()
```


```{r}
# Plot
ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = grid) +
  geom_sf(data = aggregated_points,
          aes(col = total_area),
          alpha = 0.7
          ) +
#  scale_size_continuous(name = "Total Area") +
scale_fill_viridis_c(
    trans = "log",
    breaks = c(100, 5000, 1000, 1500, 2000,2500,3000,4000,5000),
    name = "Total area",
    guide = guide_colorbar(
      direction = "vertical",
    #  barwidth = unit(10, "mm"),
     # barheight = unit(80, "mm"),
    #  title.position = "top",
    #  label.position = "right"
    )
)
```
